com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc

Interface IXLogicBuildListDRCheck

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXDRCheck, IXPlugin

    public interface IXLogicBuildListDRCheck
extends IXDRCheck
    If you need to implement a Custom DRC that works on Logic Build Lists, you need to implement this interface.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc.IXDRCheck

        IXDRCheck.Severity

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.drc.IXDRCheck

        begin, check, end, getDefaultAvailability, getDefaultSeverity

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion
